textByHashes.24cde38a8530e517c8b19e4dd03a0f80852a92ce: Hello, and welcome to The Dark Lord's temple. Zamorak will reward those who offer the bones of the vanquished on his altar.
textByHashes.8fa6fa6589a13c8638ecf6813a58f89b4fc7472f: I can exchange banknotes for bones, should you require such a service.
textByHashes.c604c2097b68e7d7e319f5eaeb0dc5a5f35ec083: My services, however, are not free. I charge 50 coins per banknote.
textByHashes.1790ee1eab0c7888312fed471d15a34ab4b51ce5: Hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.
textByHashes.ad322542ac02ebe0ad794131cc1164adb5c76eb0: That is not important. I am here to facilitate your offerings to The Dark Lord. Would you like any bone banknotes exchanged?
textByHashes.a4475aa5ba2ab361447c7d8765687b55efa5dee4: I exchange banknotes for real items. That's not a banknote.
textByHashes.d472831af72cbb986bc8372b8cc608575ca30648: I only exchange items that can be offered as a sacrifice to The Dark Lord's altar.
textByHashes.21300e9dbc8efa0762e2521de592893f3edc4d6f: I charge 50 coins for exchanging each banknote.
